'''Laera''' was the wealthy [[Bakuran]] woman who adopted [[Malinza Thanas]] after the deaths of her parents, [[Pter Thanas]] and [[Gaeriel Captison]].

Malinza called her "Aunt Laera" and said she was the only family she had left; however, as Gaeriel only had one sister, [[Ylanda Captison|Ylanda]], and Pter's family was offworld, Laera was presumably unrelated and referred to as 'aunt' out of closeness, just as Malinza referred to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] as "Uncle Luke" and also called him family.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1stm}}
